# Moore Solutions

> James S. Moore, founder of Moore Solutions. I help small businesses cut the noise and get real results with AI, backed by 20+ years building and scaling production systems. Phoenix, AZ.

## About

- [About](https://webtechhq.com/about): Who James Moore is, his background, and how the free Opportunity Finder, paid Business Audit, and First Employee build fit together.

## Services

- [Services](https://webtechhq.com/services): AI coaching and agent development, intelligent automation, and business analytics, all built on 20+ years of production systems experience.
- [Use Cases](https://webtechhq.com/use-cases): Real-world examples of how AI solves everyday problems for local service businesses, restaurants, retailers, and solo professionals.

## Tools

- [Opportunity Finder](https://webtechhq.com/signup): Free tool. Answer a few plain-English questions and get a custom AI prompt built around your business, ready to run in Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini.
- [Business Audit](https://webtechhq.com/about): Flat-rate, AI-generated written report on exactly where AI could save a business time or make it money, described in detail on the About page.

## FAQ

- [FAQ](https://webtechhq.com/faq): Direct answers to what people ask most before getting started: how the Opportunity Finder and Business Audit work, who does the work, and how billing and contracts work.

## Journal

- [Journal](https://webtechhq.com/journal): James Moore's founder-journey journal, personal essays on building Moore Solutions told from the actual stories behind each week's video.

## Contact

- [Contact](https://webtechhq.com/contact): Send a direct message, or connect via LinkedIn.

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio](https://webtechhq.com/portfolio): Public GitHub repositories behind Moore Solutions' tools and this site itself, open for review.
